CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare-Medicaid Linked Enrollee Analytic Data Set (MMLEADS) — Beneficiary Summary File
August 2021
File Sequence Long SAS NAME Label Type Length
1 BENE_ID CCW Beneficiary Identifier Num 8
2 MSIS_ID State Assigned Beneficiary Unique Identifier Char 32
3 STATE_CD State Alpha Abbreviation Char 2
4 MME_TYPE_CD Annual Medicare - Medicaid Eligibility Type Code Num 8
5 SAMPLE_GRP Sample Group Indicator - 1% Num 8
6 BIRTH_DT Date of Birth Date
